pi_items.verified_value: Three custom vocabulary entries with IDs: memorandum, policy_brief, regulatory_filing and corresponding labels Memorandum, Policy Brief, Regulatory Filing
pi_items.source: Nuxeo documentation confirms vocabularies are customizable; setup_task.sh lines 42-55 show these entries are not default Nuxeo entries but are deleted/cleaned before task execution; task description explicitly states 'add three new entries'

setup_nuxeo.sh lines 217-220 create the document at this exact path; document name is 'Annual-Report-2023' in the Projects workspace; path structure matches Nuxeo's default domain and workspace hierarchy

export_result.sh line 70 queries dc:nature field from document metadata; task description requires setting Nature field to 'Regulatory Filing'; verified that regulatory_filing is the ID (not label) of one of the vocabulary entries being added, which is the correct format for Nuxeo vocabulary references

pi_items.verified_value: These vocabulary entries (memorandum, policy_brief, regulatory_filing) are NOT in default Nuxeo installations
pi_items.source: Web search for 'Nuxeo default vocabulary nature entries' found no mention of these specific entries; Nuxeo documentation indicates vocabularies are customizable per instance; setup_task.sh explicitly deletes these entries before task starts (lines 42-55), confirming they are not defaults

privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring a Nuxeo Platform instance with a custom 'nature' vocabulary containing three synthetic entries (memorandum, policy_brief, regulatory_filing) and updating a document's metadata. The document 'Annual Report 2023' is stored at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023 and contains synthetic ACME Corporation financial content. The nature field will be set to 'regulatory_filing', which corresponds to one of the vocabulary entry IDs. All vocabulary entries and document content are task-specific and synthetic, not from a real-world Nuxeo installation.
